programme.title: The Block
programme.desc: (PG) We finally get the answer to the question we have all been asking and we find out who wins The Block 2021.

programme.title: The Block
programme.desc: Couples compete to renovate properties under strict deadlines and budgets in a high-stakes reality contest. They design, build, and style spaces while facing challenges, judging, and intense competition each week. Their finished homes are auctioned, with profits determining the winners in a dramatic finale.

programme.title: The Block: Episode
programme.desc: Couples compete to renovate properties under strict deadlines and budgets in a high-stakes reality contest. They design, build, and style spaces while facing challenges, judging, and intense competition each week. Their finished homes are auctioned, with profits determining the winners in a dramatic finale.

programme.title: The Block
programme.desc: (PG) The contestants choose their new houses after the results of the house decider challenge. Scotty reveals major changes to The Block this series which leaves the contestants in shock.

programme.title: The Block
programme.desc: Couples compete to renovate properties under strict deadlines and budgets in a high-stakes reality contest. They design, build, and style spaces while facing challenges, judging, and intense competition each week. Their finished homes are auctioned, with profits determining the winners in a dramatic finale.
